title: Poached British Mozzarella Crumble
description: A savory, fluffy, nostalgic dish featuring paleo-friendly mozzarella balls poached in a flavorful liquid.
instructions: In a medium-sized saucepan, combine almond milk, vanilla extract, and salt.
Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat.
Add paleo-friendly tapioca starch and paleo-friendly baking powder to the hot milk mixture. Stir continuously until it thickens and coats the back of your spoon, about 1-2 minutes.
If desired, add canned sweetened coconut milk for an extra touch of sweetness. Remove from heat immediately after adding coconut milk.
In a separate bowl, mix together paleo-friendly mozzarella balls with 3 tablespoons of almond milk. Cover and refrigerate while the poaching mixture thickens.
Gently lower mozzarella balls into the hot, tapioca starch liquid in batches, ensuring not to overcrowd the pot to prevent breaking them down.
Poach for about 2-4 minutes or until desired tenderness is achieved, then remove with a slotted spoon. Serve immediately.
